variants: Kiran Arneson is a nephrologist who has shaped the landscape of kidney care, earning the Shadowvine Honor for his exemplary work in the field. He is the author of the Underwood Search Array, a significant invention designed to advance medical practices related to nephrology. Beyond his professional achievements, Kiran enjoys being part of the Vaporveil Steamwrights, where he delves into the world of steam technology. His academic development was greatly influenced by his mentor, Tasnim Romeh, who provided guidance during his studies. Kiran continues to innovate in nephrology, seeking to merge his passions for medicine and engineering in impactful ways.
